name: Creamy Meatball Dinner
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Condensed cream of mushroom soup can
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the crumbs, egg, milk, onion, and salt.
2. Add the ground beef to the mixture; mix well.
3. Shape the mixture into 20 meatballs and place them in a baking dish (15 x 10 x 1 inch).
4. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the condensed cream of mushroom soup, apple juice or water, parsley, and basil. Mix well.
7. Add the meatballs to the sauce and stir to coat evenly.
8. Divide the cooked brown rice among 4 shallow serving dishes.
9. Place 5 meatballs on top of each portion of rice and some of the sauce.
10. Arrange the carrots at one end of the dish and drizzle with melted margarine or butter.
11. Cover the dishes tightly with moisture-proof wrap.
12. Freeze until ready to serve.
This recipe makes 4 servings.
